compiled_state.title: GREEN: Update validate-phase.sh for graceful skip when format/lint commands absent
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## testing_mode: GREEN

Update validate-phase.sh to use _cfg (empty default) instead of _cfg_required for commands.format, commands.format_check, and commands.lint. Add WARN messages and guard phase function call sites.

## Changes to plugins/dso/scripts/validate-phase.sh

### 1. Config cache section (lines 83-85): change _cfg_required to _cfg
Replace:
  CMD_FORMAT=$(_cfg_required "commands.format")
  CMD_FORMAT_CHECK=$(_cfg_required "commands.format_check")
  CMD_LINT=$(_cfg_required "commands.lint")
With:
  CMD_FORMAT=$(_cfg "commands.format" "")
  CMD_FORMAT_CHECK=$(_cfg "commands.format_check" "")
  CMD_LINT=$(_cfg "commands.lint" "")
  [[ -z "$CMD_FORMAT" ]] && echo "[DSO WARN] commands.format not configured — format steps will be skipped." >&2
  [[ -z "$CMD_FORMAT_CHECK" ]] && echo "[DSO WARN] commands.format_check not configured — format-check steps will be skipped." >&2
  [[ -z "$CMD_LINT" ]] && echo "[DSO WARN] commands.lint not configured — lint steps will be skipped." >&2

### 2. phase_auto_fix() (line 281): guard CMD_FORMAT collect_modified
  [[ -n "$CMD_FORMAT" ]] && collect_modified "FORMAT" "$CMD_FORMAT"

### 3. phase_auto_fix() (line 289): guard run_check calls
  [[ -n "$CMD_FORMAT_CHECK" ]] && { run_check "FORMAT_CHECK" "$CMD_FORMAT_CHECK" || any_fail=1; }
  [[ -n "$CMD_LINT" ]] && { run_check "LINT" "$CMD_LINT" || any_fail=1; }

### 4. phase_post_batch() (lines 303-305): guard format and run_check calls
  [[ -n "$CMD_FORMAT" ]] && (cd "$REPO_ROOT" && eval "$CMD_FORMAT" >/dev/null 2>&1) || true
  [[ -n "$CMD_FORMAT_CHECK" ]] && { run_check "FORMAT" "$CMD_FORMAT_CHECK" || any_fail=1; }
  [[ -n "$CMD_LINT" ]] && { run_check "LINT" "$CMD_LINT" || any_fail=1; }

### 5. phase_tier_transition() (lines 316-317): guard run_check calls
  [[ -n "$CMD_FORMAT_CHECK" ]] && { run_check "FORMAT" "$CMD_FORMAT_CHECK" || any_fail=1; }
  [[ -n "$CMD_LINT" ]] && { run_check "LINT" "$CMD_LINT" || any_fail=1; }

## Files to modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/validate-phase.sh

## Acceptance criteria
- RED tests from Task a48a-fdb1 pass GREEN for validate-phase.sh tests
- validate-phase.sh with config missing all 3 keys → exits 0 with WARN messages
- validate-phase.sh with config present → existing behavior preserved
- commands.validate still _cfg_required (do not change)
